title: T-033 — Browser PDF label generation (pdf-lib) on output registration
prompt:
# T-033 — Browser PDF label generation

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.3 FR-08-E3-006, §6 D14

## Goal
Generate browser-printable PDF label using pdf-lib on output registration with GTIN, batch_number, expiry_date, qty/weight, QR code linking to /lp/:id.

## Implementation contract
Create packages/labels/src/generate-output-label.ts using pdf-lib. Inputs: {item_gtin, batch_number, expiry_date, qty_kg, lp_id, item_name}. Output: Uint8Array PDF (4x6 inch label). Include human-readable + QR code (qrcode npm). Add route apps/web/app/api/production/outputs/[id]/label/route.ts (GET) returning PDF stream. Update register-output to set label_pdf_url to this route URL. Add unit test verifying PDF is non-empty, includes batch_number text, and is valid PDF/A.

## Files (scope)
- packages/labels/src/generate-output-label.ts [create]
- packages/labels/package.json [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/outputs/[id]/label/route.ts [create]
- packages/labels/src/__tests__/generate-output-label.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given valid output_id, when GET /api/production/outputs/:id/label, then 200 application/pdf with non-empty body and PDF magic header '%PDF-'
2. Given inputs {batch='WO-001-OUT-001', qty=100}, when generate-output-label runs, then PDF text content includes 'WO-001-OUT-001' and '100'
3. Given non-existent output_id, when GET label, then 404

## Test strategy
- RED: unit test asserting PDF magic header + batch text + 404 before label generator exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter labels test generate-output-label'

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement ZPL generation (D14 P2)
- Do not embed credentials in PDF
- Do not skip QR code (operator UX requirement)

pipeline_inputs.description: Browser PDF label via pdf-lib + QR code; label route returns PDF stream.
pipeline_inputs.details: Standalone package packages/labels. pdf-lib generates 4x6 label, qrcode encodes GTIN-128 + batch + expiry + LP link. Route streams PDF. label_pdf_url stored on wo_outputs row.
acceptance_criteria: Given valid output_id, when GET label, then 200 application/pdf body with '%PDF-' header
Given batch='WO-001-OUT-001' qty=100, when generated, then PDF text includes batch and '100'
Given non-existent output_id, when GET, then 404
test_strategy: RED: unit test asserting PDF header + text + 404 before generator exists
